rationale: Elec. Code §254.035 governs timing of political expenditure reporting. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: For purposes of reporting under this chapter, a political expenditure is not considered to have been made until the amount is readily determinable by the person making the expenditure
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict.
